## Functions

| Function | Visibility | Parameters |

| `getLatestEpoch` | external | bytes32 agentId |
| `getEpochCount` | external | bytes32 agentId |

| `getEpochRange` | external | bytes32 agentId, uint256 offset, uint256 limit |
